apps.name: StikDebug
apps.subtitle: On-device debugger and JIT enabler
apps.localizedDescription: An on-device debugger and JIT enabler for iOS 17.4 and newer, powered by idevice.

versions.localizedDescription: Fixes TXM checks for devices with A13/A14/M1 chips on iOS 27. Apps you want to enable JIT for require their own patches to work on those versions as well.
